headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: May 14, 2026**
article:
The New York Yankees suffered a dominant 7-0 loss to the Baltimore Orioles, led by Kyle Bradish's strong performance. The Los Angeles Angels fell short in Cleveland, with Zach Neto leading the offense with a 2-hit, 1-home run, 2-RBI effort. The Washington Nationals secured a thrilling 8-7 win over the Cincinnati Reds, overcoming a late deficit.

Several key players have been impacted by injuries, including Athletics right-handed pitcher Brooks Kriske, who has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to a right shoulder impingement. Other injured players include Miami Marlins left-handed pitcher Robby Snelling, New York Mets catcher Francisco Alvarez, Cincinnati Reds right-handed pitcher Rhett Lowder, Los Angeles Angels left-handed pitcher Drew Pomeranz, Baltimore Orioles right fielder Dylan Beavers, Baltimore Orioles left-handed pitcher Grant Wolfram, and Athletics shortstop Jacob Wilson.

The Arizona Diamondbacks have made a move to bolster their roster, acquiring outfielder Jose Requena from the Los Angeles Dodgers in exchange for center fielder Alek Thomas. The San Francisco Giants traded catcher Patrick Bailey to the Cleveland Guardians for left-handed pitcher Matt Wilkinson and other considerations. The Baltimore Orioles acquired right-handed pitcher Enyel Garcia and right-handed pitcher Maicol Lauriano from the Philadelphia Phillies for cash.

top_news.title: **Yankees Fall to Orioles in Dominant 7-0 Loss**
top_news.summary: The New York Yankees were shut down by the Baltimore Orioles, who won 7-0 behind a strong performance from Kyle Bradish.

top_news.title: **Angels Fall Short in Cleveland**
top_news.summary: The Los Angeles Angels dropped a 2-4 decision to the Cleveland Guardians, unable to overcome a strong performance from the Guardians' pitching staff. Zach Neto led the Angels' offense with a 2-hit, 1-home run, 2-RBI effort.

top_news.title: **Nationals Edge Reds in Thrilling 8-7 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Washington Nationals secured a hard-fought 8-7 win over the Cincinnati Reds, overcoming a late deficit to claim the game. Tyler Stephenson led the Reds' offense with a home run and 4 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Rockies Rout Pirates 10-4**
top_news.summary: The Colorado Rockies dominated the Pittsburgh Pirates, securing a 10-4 victory. Mickey Moniak led the Rockies' offense with a 3-hit, 1-home run, 5-RBI performance.

top_news.title: **Athletics RHP Brooks Kriske Lands on 15-Day Injured List**
top_news.summary: Athletics right-handed pitcher Brooks Kriske has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to a right shoulder impingement. The injury occurred on May 13, 2026.

top_news.title: **Diamondbacks Acquire Requena in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Arizona Diamondbacks have made a move to bolster their roster, acquiring outfielder Jose Requena from the Los Angeles Dodgers. Requena joins the Diamondbacks in exchange for center fielder Alek Thomas.
